role_title: Manager, Growth Creative Strategy & Optimization - Markets & Subscribers

level_signals: This is a senior individual contributor role
5+ years of experience in performance creative, growth marketing, or a related creative strategy role
Comp range $95K-$135K base, consistent with Senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 5+ years of experience in performance creative, growth marketing, or a related creative strategy role, ideally within a consumer tech or media brand
You have a track record of developing creative at scale across multiple markets and languages that drives measurable performance outcomes across paid and owned channels
You are familiar with platform-specific creative specs and best practices across Meta, TikTok, Snapchat, and Google
You bring strong creative instincts and a high bar for quality, and can provide clear, constructive feedback
You think in systems and have built or improved creative workflows, review processes, or operating frameworks
You are comfortable working with data and can interpret creative metrics and contribute to a test-and-learn framework with a clear point of view
You are an effective communicator who can translate performance data into creative direction and influence cross-functional stakeholders
You are self-directed and organized, able to manage multiple workstreams and prioritize in a fast-moving environment
You are comfortable using AI tools to support creative production, improve efficiency, and scale output

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: ideally within a consumer tech or media brand
You have experience with creative automation or DCO platforms (e.g., Smartly, Celtra)
You have a passion for music and audio — you're a Spotify listener first
You are detail-oriented, results-driven, and open-minded, with a willingness to stay close to the work

scope.surface: Performance Marketing (paid acquisition) and Lifecycle Marketing (on-platform organic acquisition) creative across global markets
core_responsibilities: Lead end-to-end creative development for Paid Social (Meta, TikTok, Snapchat), Google (Demand Gen, Google App Campaigns), CTV, and lifecycle marketing channels from brief through final asset delivery
Build and maintain a creative review framework that defines who reviews what, at which stage, and against which criteria
Advocate for creative quality, going beyond brand guideline compliance to support work that is compelling, differentiated, and built to perform
Develop a POV on creative volume and testing — how much creative is needed, what should be tested, and what is driving impact vs. generating noise
Build an annual creative roadmap of themes, priorities, and focus areas
Analyze creative performance metrics (CTR, CVR, CPA, etc.) to identify effective patterns and surface opportunities for improvement
Synthesize test results into clear, actionable creative briefs and iteration roadmaps
Identify and implement automation and AI tools across the creative workflow
Stay ahead of platform-specific creative best practices and emerging formats
Collaborate with media buyers and growth managers to ensure creative is aligned with investment strategy, platform algorithms, and audience targeting

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($95K-$135K base plus equity)
Fully remote within North Americas region — broad geographic flexibility
Clear senior IC scope with no direct reports required
Benefits package explicitly detailed (parental leave, 401k, meal allowance, PTO)
red_flags: Role title includes 'Manager' but is explicitly a senior individual contributor role — title may be misleading for candidates expecting people management
Visa sponsorship status not addressed anywhere in the JD
Compensation range is relatively modest ($95K-$135K) for a senior IC at a large tech company — may reflect geographic range across North Americas or level calibration
Eastern Standard time zone collaboration requirement may be restrictive for candidates on the West Coast or elsewhere in North Americas

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 'senior individual contributor role' + comp + years)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and MAU/subscriber growth focus)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities and named metrics in JD)
location.visa_sponsorship (not addressed in JD; defaulted to 'unclear')
ambiguities: Role title says 'Manager' but the body explicitly states 'This is a senior individual contributor role' — may cause candidate confusion about scope or leveling.

The JD says 'within the North Americas region' for remote eligibility but does not specify whether Canada or other non-US North Americas countries are included; treated as remote-us given US comp range and EST collaboration requirement.
detail-oriented, results-driven, and open-minded bullet could be read as either a must-have or nice-to-have; classified as soft given its cultural/trait nature and position in the list.
